summary: Completed accounting audit and fixes. All 5 invariants reviewed: I1 available_cash (BUG FIXED: missing fees_usd), I2 live_equity mark-to-market (BUG FIXED: using best_ask instead of best_bid), I3 session_pnl anchoring (CONFIRMED), I4 realized_pnl accumulation (CONFIRMED), I5 no double-counting (CONFIRMED).

I1_available_cash.issue: _compute_open_trade_accounting() did not include entry fees_usd in total_committed_usd calculation
I1_available_cash.fix: Added fees_usd to SQL SELECT and summation formula
I1_available_cash.lines_changed: dashboard_server.py:310-311 (added fees_usd to query), 319 (added fees_usd to committed sum)

I2_live_equity_bid.issue: _stream_positions_mark() used current_price (which could be best_ask) for unrealized_pnl instead of held_side_bid
I2_live_equity_bid.fix: Changed unrealized_pnl_usd to use best_bid instead of current_price
I2_live_equity_bid.lines_changed: dashboard_server.py:476-480 (use best_bid for unrealized PnL calculation)

I3_session_pnl_anchor.detail: session_pnl correctly sums CLOSED trades WHERE ts_close >= session_start_ts from state.json. Does not reset on process restart.

I4_lifetime_realized_pnl.detail: realized_pnl correctly equals SUM(pnl_usd) for all CLOSED trades. state.json value (-91.1263) matches DB query result.

I5_no_double_counting.detail: Open positions counted separately (status='open') from realized PnL (status='closed'). No overlap.

notes: Removed dead code: available_cash calculation in _compute_open_trade_accounting() was never used by API. Actual available_cash is computed in _read_state().
I2 fix only affects SSE stream endpoint (/api/stream/state), not main API. Dashboard display of unrealized PnL now correctly uses bid price.
I1 fix affects available_cash calculation in bankroll object returned by /api/state endpoint.
Database schema verified: trades table includes fees_usd field for both open and closed positions.
next_steps: Test /api/state endpoint to verify available_cash now includes entry fees
Monitor /api/stream/state for unrealized_pnl_usd accuracy with best_bid prices
Verify session_pnl continues to anchor across process restarts
